name: Shiba Studio
tagline: A local-first studio for building and orchestrating Grok-powered agents.
description: Shiba Studio unifies agent orchestration, workspace-aware coding, browser control, scheduling, integrations, memory, and auditable local workflows in a desktop-grade web application.

name: security-recipes.ai
tagline: From vulnerability intelligence to verified action.
description: An open, self-hostable knowledge layer that connects source-backed CVE research to bounded remediation recipes, required evidence, rollback guidance, and human-reviewed outcomes.

name: OSS Dependency Explorer
tagline: See what your software depends on—and where the risk lives.
description: A software-supply-chain research tool that maps package dependencies across eight ecosystems and combines them with vulnerability, repository health, license, and SBOM analysis.

name: Tiny Book Buddies AI
tagline: Turn one bedtime idea into an illustrated, narrated storybook.
description: A browser-based story studio that writes, illustrates, narrates, and exports children's books using the AI providers and models selected by the user.

name: Pro Response
tagline: Refine team messages with AI before they are sent.
description: A multi-provider writing assistant that rewrites, translates, summarizes, and reformats messages through Slack, an HTTP API, a command-line tool, or a Python library.

name: mouseclicker.app
tagline: Portable Windows automation with record/replay and AI-generated patterns.
description: A configurable auto clicker for Windows with humanized cursor movement, global hotkeys, system-wide recording, replay, and cloud or local AI pattern generation.

name: DOGE Commerce Kit
tagline: A non-custodial toolkit for accepting Dogecoin in person or online.
description: A commerce toolkit for small businesses with browser wallet tools, point-of-sale checkout, payment QR codes, on-chain verification, a local order ledger, and embeddable website components.

name: DOGE MINER
tagline: Real Scrypt pool mining with a transparent live dashboard.
description: A full-stack Dogecoin pool miner implementing Scrypt on CPU and OpenCL GPUs, with live pool responses, share statistics, hardware telemetry, and on-chain wallet data.

name: Arrowhead Paesano
tagline: A static fan site with an automated weekly analysis desk.
description: The official site for the Arrowhead Paesano YouTube channel: privacy-friendly video playback over a checked-in channel snapshot, plus an engine that regenerates a sourced weekly Chiefs preview with matchups, projections, and a ready-to-shoot run-of-show.
